name: Undercraft
short_description: Create your world in this sandbox game where you can dig, build, explore, fight, and farm. Have a different experience in a day or night adventure. Explore a procedurally generated world.
detailed_description:
Undercraft is a sandbox game set in a procedurally generated world. Have different experiences every time you play the game. Explore this vast world.

Game Features:
- Travel through this medieval fantasy world
- Generate your world procedurally
- Fight against Goblins and Skeletons of different types
- Craft various items to survive
- Build your own house to survive
- Take care with the passing of day to night
- Swim and dive in ocean waters for survival
- Collect various resources across the map
- Make different types of weapons to survive
- Dig a hole anywhere in the ground and create houses inside it to survive
- Help Villagers in case they need help
- Punitive combat system, block, attack. Use your creativity to fight the enemy
- Wander through the biomes and find different resources, enemies, and people.
- Manage your stats if you want to survive, don't go hungry or dehydrated.
- And many more updates to come. Stay Tuned!
